name: Airport National Golf Course
address: 3001 Wright Brothers Blvd E, Cedar Rapids, IA 52404
about: Airport National Public Golf Complex is a multi-faceted golf facility offering both outdoor play and indoor simulator experiences. The venue is equipped with Foresight Falcon launch monitors, providing advanced technology for year-round practice and play. It operates on an hourly pricing model, accommodating up to five people per simulator bay, with a flat rate regardless of group size. The facility is best suited for casual players, groups, and those seeking a relaxed golf outing experience.
why_golfers_like_it: Premium Foresight Falcon launch monitor technology
Flat hourly rate accommodating up to 5 people
Year-round access for practice and leagues
Available for private events and group outings

simulator_hardware.notes: The game's most advanced launch monitor

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The facility does not specify whether club rentals are available, so it's recommended to bring your own clubs.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drink?
faq.answer: The venue offers ice cream on-site, but outside food and drink policies are not specified.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The time for 18 holes is not specified, but simulator time is booked by the hour with recommended durations based on group size.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue features a mini-golf course and offers junior golf academy programs, making it suitable for families.

opening_hours: Sat 9am-9pm | Sunday 9am-8pm | Sat 9am-9pm | Sunday 9am-8pm | Sat 9am-9pm | Sunday 9am-8pm
